title: liquidambar orientalis
intro: Liquidambar orientalis, also known as Oriental Sweetgum or Oriental Storax, is a deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The bark and roots of the plant contain storax, a resinous substance used in traditional medicine, which has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Liquidambar orientalis have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Liquidambar orientalis include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
